product: Use PDFs in Information Extraction and Custom LLM (Beta)
tagline: Information Extraction and Custom LLM have a UI workflow to convert PDFs to Markdown and store the results in a table.
what_it_does: Information Extraction and Custom LLM have a UI workflow to convert PDFs to Markdown and store the results in a table. Users can then use the resulting table as input in Information Extraction and Custom LLM. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Custom LLM leverages automated evaluation capabilities, including MLflow and Agent Evaluation, to enable rapid assessment of the cost quality tradeoff for your specific extraction task.
